description_long: This object is a stylized representation of a fried egg, featuring a slightly domed, circular white base with a smooth, matte finish. The central area is occupied by a raised, round yellow section, mimicking the yolk, which is seamlessly integrated into the white portion. The edges of the white are irregular and gently sloped, giving the appearance of a cooked egg white spreading out on a flat surface. The surface is free of any visible cracks, burn marks, or additional textures, maintaining a clean and simple look. The color contrast between the white and yellow is distinct, with no visible blending or gradient. There are no visible decorative patterns or markings, and the object appears solid and uniform throughout.
description: A stylized fried egg with a smooth white base and a raised yellow yolk in the center, featuring clean lines and no decorative patterns.
description_view_0: The egg is seen from a slightly angled top view, showing the full yellow yolk and the irregular white base.
description_view_1: This view presents the egg from a rotated angle, with the yolk still centered and the white base appearing more polygonal.
description_view_2: The egg is viewed from another side, highlighting the gentle slope of the white and the central yolk.
description_view_3: A similar side angle as previous views, with the yolk and white base both clearly visible and the surface remaining smooth.
attribute_orientation: lying flat with the yolk centered on top
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely encountered as part of a breakfast or meal setting, served on a plate or tray.
